title: arctotis linearis
intro: Arctotis linearis, also known as the linear arctotis or linear daisy, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been reported to help with various health issues. The health benefits of Arctotis linearis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat skin conditions such as wounds and dermatitis. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be used externally as a poultice or applied directly to the skin.
